results.rendered_html:
paurastya a. [puras -bhavārye tyak aṇ ca]
1 Eastern: paurastyo vā sukhayati marut sādhusaṃvāhanābhiḥ  Māl. 9. 25  paurastyajhaṃjhāmarut 9. 17 ;  R. 4. 34. 
2 Foremost.
3 Prior, first, preceding.
